race.comment: ECLAIR VITALITY (1) continues to leave himself with too much to do but possesses a strong turn of foot. If he can settle a fraction closer this time he will prove very tough to hold out. ALL SHOT (7) didn't fire last start but pulled up with excuses. Caught the eye the start prior when flashing home to only miss by a long neck at Gawler. The fact he's still in work suggests he's come through the run fine and can bounce back sharply. BRISEIS ECLIPSE (16) has good early speed and should find this a bit easier. Expect her to bounce somewhere near the lead and give backers a sight. HERE COMES HOGAN (5) is going better than his form reads and is at peak fitness now. Inside alley should have him handy throughout. Don't dismiss completely.
